name: ASRock IMB-1244-WV Mini-ITX Industrial Motherboard - Intel Q670 Chipset - 2x 262-pin SO-DIMM DDR5 4800/5600 MHz - 1x Right Angle PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x Intel 2.5 Gigabit LAN - 1x Intel Gigabit LAN - 2x HDMI 2.0b - DP 1.4a - LVDS - eDP 1.4b - TPM 2.0 onboard IC
shortName: ASRock IMB-1244-WV Mini-ITX Industrial Motherboard - Intel Q670
description: Mini-ITX industrial motherboard with Q670 chipset, dual Ethernet, and flexible I/O for embedded systems.
